/CAL:REQUEST TO SETTLE THE RECORD ON APPEAL //X:REGARDING THE MISSING JURY NOTE, THE PARTIES STIPULATED AS FOLLOWS:THAT DURING DELIBERATION THE JURY SENT A NOTE(QUESTION)TO THE COURT REQUESTING READBACK OF TESTIMONY BY THE EXPERT WITNESS ON THE EFFECT OF PCP, AND MR, CULLINAN REPRESENTING THE PEOPLE, AND MR, GOLDMAN REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANT,STIPULATED TO CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE TESTIMONY FOR READBACK TO THE JURY,THECOURT REPORTER JACQUELINE CHAN ACTUALLY TRANSCRIBED VERBATIM WHAT SHE READBACK TO THE JURY PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, AND THE COURTALSO HAS RECOLLECTION OF SUPERVISING THE DISCUSSIONT BETWEEN THE ATTORNEYSAND APPROVED THE STIPULATION THAT THEY ENTERED INTO THAT LATER ON WERE THEREADBACKS THAT WERE GIVEN TO THE JURY, AND ON APRIL 26, 2004 THE COURT REPORTER PREPARED A TRANSCRIPT OF THE PROCEEDING DOCUMENTING WHAT SHE READ BACK TO THE JURY,/X:THE COURT ORDERS A TRANSCRIPT OT TODAY PROCEEDINGS TO BEPART OF THE RECORD AS PART OF OUR AUGMENTATION OF THE RECORD ON APPEAL,/
